content.text:
Here’s what’s available in the Northwind analytics catalog right now:

Primary data models (analytics-ready)
- Products (77 SKUs across 8 categories)
- Product Categories (Beverages, Condiments, Confections, Dairy Products, Grains/Cereals, Meat/Poultry, Produce, Seafood)
- Orders (830 orders)
- Order Line Items (2,155 line items)
- Customers (91 customers across 21 countries)
- Employees (9 sales reps / managers)
- Suppliers (29 suppliers from 16 countries)
- Regions (Eastern, Western, Northern, Southern)
- Analytics data cube (pre-aggregated measures for reporting)

Reference / metric models
- Key metrics & measures: Revenue, Orders, Products Sold, Customers Served
- Financial & operational measures: Average Order Value, Discount Analysis, Freight Costs

Where it lives
- Catalog node: Northwind/Analytics (nodeType: Northwind/AnalyticsCatalog)

If you’d like, I can open a specific analytics view (Dashboard, SalesByCategory, TopProducts, CustomerSummary, etc.). Tell me which model or report you want to explore and I’ll display the appropriate layout area.
